potassium.action: Seek immediate medical attention. Can cause cardiac arrhythmias.

sodium.action: Seek immediate medical attention. Severe electrolyte imbalance.

fasting_glucose.action: Seek immediate medical attention. Risk of diabetic ketoacidosis (high) or hypoglycemia (low).

hemoglobin.action: Seek medical attention urgently. Severe anemia (low) or polycythemia (high).

platelets.action: Seek medical attention urgently. Bleeding risk (low) or clotting risk (high).

wbc.action: Seek medical attention urgently. Severe neutropenia (low) or possible leukemia (high).

inr.action: Seek immediate medical attention, especially if on anticoagulants. High bleeding risk.

creatinine.action: Seek medical attention urgently. Severely impaired kidney function.

calcium.action: Seek medical attention urgently. Risk of cardiac arrhythmias and seizures.

tsh.action: Consult an endocrinologist promptly. Severe thyroid dysfunction.
